[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A woman is posed indoors against a light marble-like wall while wearing a black spaghetti-strap dress.

Main Subject:
A single woman is the main focus, shown from about the waist up to mid-thigh. She has long, dark brown hair styled in loose waves, with part of the hair falling over her right shoulder. She wears a black, sleeveless camisole-style dress with thin spaghetti straps and a smooth, slightly draped fabric. Her body is angled slightly to the left while her face is turned toward the camera. Her head is tilted subtly, and she has a neutral, slightly closed-mouth expression.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors. The background is a pale, marble-like wall with soft gray veining. On the right side of the image, there is a small, light-colored object resembling a countertop fixture or accessory with a rectangular base and a darker upper section.

Visual Details:
The lighting is soft and even, with a bright, clean look and minimal shadows. The color palette is dominated by pale whites and grays in the background and the solid black of the dress. The camera angle is slightly above or level with her face, creating a flattering portrait composition. She sits or reclines with her legs extending out of frame; the dress falls in a straight, smooth line, and the straps are clearly visible. The background is uncluttered, emphasizing the subject.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person posing indoors in front of a pale marble-like wall. She is wearing a black thin-strap dress and looking toward the camera.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
